final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram
Asset type: medical education poster, brand visual
Primary request: macro-micro composite visualization of human nervous system combining full-body neural network with magnified neuron anatomy
Scene/backdrop: deep cosmic black void with subtle starfield, creating sense of vastness and mystery
Subject: semi-transparent human silhouette with glowing blue-white neural pathways extending from cerebral cortex through spinal cord to peripheral extremities; magnified inset showing detailed neuron structure including dendrites, axon, myelin sheath, and synaptic vesicles with neurotransmitter particles dispersing across synaptic cleft
Style/medium: scientific visualization blending medical illustration precision with artistic poster impact, digital 3D render with ethereal glow effects
Composition/framing: centered full-body figure with neural network as primary focal point, circular magnified detail inset positioned at lower right showing cellular level
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent glow from neural pathways against dark cosmic background, dramatic contrast creating awe and scientific wonder
Color palette: cool blues, cyan-white luminescence, deep cosmic black, subtle gold accents for synaptic highlights
Materials/textures: semi-transparent organic silhouette, fiber-optic neural lines with soft glow, cellular structures with scientific accuracy, particle effects for neurotransmitters
Constraints: maintain medical accuracy in neuron anatomy, preserve the cosmic-neural visual metaphor, ensure both macro and micro scales are clearly readable
Avoid: cartoonish simplification, cluttered background, warm color dominance, blurry cellular details, watermark
